data.title: Gold Royalty misses top-line estimates; reaffirms FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Gold Royalty press release (NYSE:GROY): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of -$0.01 in-line.
  • Revenue of $3.14M (+8.3% Y/Y) misses by $0.56M.
  • 1,249 GEOs in the quarter.
  • Record positive operating cash flow of $2.5 million, Adjusted EBITDA of $1.7 million, and net loss of $1.3 million.
  • The company remains on track to achieve its outlook of 5,700 – 7,000 GEOs for 2025, with production on its interests weighted towards the second half of the year as several projects continue to ramp-up and progress towards full steady-state production.

data.title: BSR REIT reports Q1 results
data.description:
• BSR REIT press release (OTCPK:BSRTF): Q1 FFO in Q1 2025 was $12.4 million, or $0.23 per Unit, compared to $13.6 million, or $0.25 per Unit, for Q1 2024. 
  • AFFO was $11.8 million, or $0.22 per Unit for Q1 2025 compared to $12.9 million, or $0.24 per Unit, for Q1 2024. 
  • NAV was $899.5 million, or $16.66 per unit, as of March 31, 2025 compared to $901.3 million, or $16.75 per unit, as of December 31, 2024.
  • Revenue of $43.48M (+3.6% Y/Y).
  • Same Community NOI for Q1 2025 increased 2.3% compared to Q1 2024;
  • Weighted average occupancy was 95.9% as of March 31, 2025, compared to 95.3% as of March 31, 2024;
  • During Q1 2025, the REIT's AFFO payout ratio was 63.8%;
  • Debt to Gross Book Value was 45.3% as of March 31, 2025 which decreased 120 basis points from 46.5% as of December 31, 2024.

data.title: ADTRAN beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; initiates Q2 outlook
data.description:
• ADTRAN press release (NASDAQ:ADTN): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.03 beats by $0.06.
  • Revenue of $247.7M (+9.5% Y/Y) beats by $2.55M.
  • Net cash provided by operating activities of $41.6 million.
  • Cash and cash equivalents of $101.3 million, an increase of $23.8 million sequentially.

  • Business outlook1

    For the second quarter of 2025, the Company expects revenue to be within a range of $247.5 million to $262.5 million (vs. consensus of $255.07M). Non-GAAP operating margin is expected to be within a range of 0% to 4%.

data.title: Accenture to acquire digital services provider Yumemi
data.description:
Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has agreed to acquire Japan-based digital services provider, Yumemi.

Terms of the transaction have not been disclosed. Completion of the acquisition is subject to customary closing conditions.

Founded in 2000, Yumemi has developed an extensive variety of digital products for over 600 companies spanning all major industries, reaching 60 million monthly active users globally. Its team of around 400 professionals in Japan will join Accenture Song, Accenture's tech-powered creative group.

Atsushi Egawa, CEO, Accenture, Japan, and co-CEO, Asia-Pacific, said: “By integrating Yumemi’s advanced capabilities, we will bolster our ability to help clients address critical business challenges by anticipating their needs and supporting the development of innovative new digital products.”

Source: Press Release

data.title: Athabasca Oil GAAP EPS of $0.14, revenue of $367.84M
data.description:
• Athabasca Oil press release (OTCPK:ATHOF): Q1 GAAP EPS of $0.14.
  • Revenue of $367.84M (+18.2% Y/Y).
  • Production: Average production of 37,714 boe/d (98% Liquids), representing 13% (24% per share) growth year over year.
  • Cash Flow: Adjusted Funds Flow of $130 million ($0.25 per share), representing 63% per share growth year over year. Cash Flow from Operating Activities of $123 million. Free Cash Flow of $71 million from Athabasca (Thermal Oil).
  • Capital Program: $63 million total capital expenditures, with $44 million at Leismer as the Company advances the 40,000 bbl/d progressive growth project.

  • Strategic Update and Corporate Guidance

    • Athabasca (Thermal Oil): The Thermal Oil division underpins the Company’s strong Free Cash Flow outlook, with production guidance of 33,500 – 35,500 bbl/d and a ~$250 million capital budget.
    • Consolidated Production Outlook: Athabasca’s consolidated annual production guidance is 37,500 – 39,500 boe/d. Current production is ~40,000 boe/d and with current capital plans the Company is expecting to be at the upper end of guidance and anticipates exiting the year at ~41,000 boe/d.
    • Duvernay Energy Corporation: The 2025 capital program of ~$75 million will continue production momentum in H2 2025 with an exit target of ~6,000 boe/d.
    • Free Cash Flow Focus: The Company forecasts consolidated Adjusted Funds Flow between $525 – $550 million1, including $475 – $500 million from its Thermal Oil assets.

data.title: GoGold Resources GAAP EPS of $0.01, revenue of $17.6M
data.description:
• GoGold Resources press release (OTCQX:GLGDF): Q2 GAAP EPS of $0.01.
  • Revenue of $17.6M (+96.9% Y/Y) on the sale of 555,511 silver equivalent ounces at an average realized price per ounce of $31.70.
  • Cash of $78.3 million USD, an increase of $2.0 million during the quarter.
  • Cash flow from operations of $5.1 million.
  • Production of 555,479 silver equivalent ounces, consisting of 210,289 silver ounces, 3,279 gold ounces, 155 copper tonnes, 160 zinc tonnes.
  • Cash cost per silver equivalent ounce of $17.85.
  • All in sustaining cost per silver equivalent ounce of $22.98.

data.title: Viemed Healthcare GAAP EPS of $0.06, revenue of $59.1M; updates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Viemed Healthcare press release (NASDAQ:VMD): Q1 GAAP EPS of $0.06.
  • Revenue of $59.1M (+16.8% Y/Y).
  • Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter ended March 31, 2025 totaled $12.8 million, a 26% increase as compared to the quarter ended March 31, 2024.
  • The Company increased its ventilator patient count to 11,809 as of March 31, 2025, an increase of 13% over March 31, 2024, and a slight increase as compared to December 31, 2024.
  • The Company increased its PAP therapy patient count to 22,899 as of March 31, 2025, an increase of 46% over March 31, 2024, and a 7% sequential increase from December 31, 2024.

  • Updated Full Year 2025 Guidance (all dollar amounts are USD):

    • Net revenue for the year ending December 31, 2025 is expected to be in the range of $256 million to $265 million (vs. consensus of $260.37M), increased from the prior range of $254 million to $265 million.
    • Adjusted EBITDA for the year ending December 31, 2025 is expected to be in the range of $55 million to $58 million, increased from the prior range of $54 million to $58 million. See “Forward-Looking Statements” below for further information on this non-GAAP financial guidance.

data.title: Vaxcyte GAAP EPS of -$1.04 beats by $0.27
data.description:
• Vaxcyte press release (NASDAQ:PCVX): Q1 GAAP EPS of -$1.04 beats by $0.27.
  • Cash Position: Cash, cash equivalents and investments were $2,950.8 million as of March 31, 2025, compared to $3,134.7 million as of December 31, 2024.

data.title: China Airlines orders Boeing 777X passenger and freighter models
Lundin Mining reports mixed Q1 results; reaffirms FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Lundin Mining press release (OTCPK:LUNMF): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.11 misses by $0.02.
  • Revenue of $963.9M (+2.9% Y/Y) beats by $86.76M. Realized copper price1 of $4.63 /lb and a realized gold price1 of $3,349 /oz.
  • Copper Production: Production of 76,774 tonnes of copper in the first quarter from continuing operations.
  • Other Production: During the quarter, 32,000 ounces of gold and 2,296 tonnes of nickel were produced.
  • Adjusted EBITDA1: $387.9 million was generated from continuing operations for the quarter.
  • Cash Generation: Cash provided by continuing operations was $122.3 million and free cash flow from operations - continuing operations1 was $21.6 million.
  • Outlook: The Company reaffirms it is tracking to full year guidance for production, cash costs and capital expenditures. The Company continues to benefit from stronger throughput at Candelaria and Caserones, while higher gold prices have improved cash costs which are expected to continue into the second quarter.
